name: Ninym Ralei
description: Ninym is a beautiful white-haired, red-eyed Flahm girl who is Wein's childhood friend. As his top aide, she assists him in everything from affairs of the state to combat. She is among the few who know what he is really like, as well as the kingdom's current dire straits.

name: Aren Kuboyasu
description: Kuboyasu in his previous school wore the typical delinquent clothes. He sported a pompadour hairstyle, and wore a modified school uniform with his pants looking more like an over-sized skirt. After moving to PK Academy, Kuboyasu changed his looks into more of a normal student like wearing glasses and dyeing his hair dark violet. name: Runa Yomozuki
description: She is a member of the Student Council and also a leader of the Election Committee, serving as a referee during election gambling matches. ~!Runa is a sadistic and two-faced person, who seems to be very cute and nice at first but in reality she enjoys watching other people fail and loves to mock them.!~

name: Ririka Momobami
description: She is the vice president of the student council and is seen almost entirely throughout the whole time wearing a mask that covers her whole face. Ririka is a very quiet and stoic person. She often acts as an observer.

name: Sophie Hatter
description: She is a plain looking 18-year-old young adult, who passes all of her time working in a hat shop. She has big brown eyes and matching hair, tied with two pink ribbons, in a long braid. She has thick eyebrows, and Howl says that her smile is beautiful. She wears a cerulean dress with a white neck and black buttons. Sophie is a gentle, quiet young woman who doesn't like being in the spotlight. She is mature, and wears clothes meant for women older than her, despite her sister, Lettie's, protests.

name: Kuzan
description: __Height:__ 298 cm (9'9") __Devil Fruit:__ Hie Hie no Mi (Ice Ice Fruit) __Devil Fruit Type:__ Logia Kuzan, better known by his former alias Aokiji, is one of the three Marine admirals. Kuzan is a very laid back man, showing no shock or surprise from almost anything. His lack of interest and lazy justice (as he describes his motto himself) let others often believe he can not possibly be a marine of such a high ranking. However, if he deems a situation worthy, he will take action. He seems to be

name: Igris
description: Igris is one of the first Shadows that Sung Jin-Woo acquired. He was initially protecting an empty throne in an Instant Dungeon where Jin-Woo was doing his Job Quest in the Job Change Quest Dungeon. After two failed attempts of Shadow Extraction, Sung Jin-Woo convinced him to protect him instead of protecting an Empty throne, obtaining him as a Knight Grade Shadow.

description: Alpha is the main character of the series. As an A7-M2 model robot, one of the few production prototypes, she is one of the first of the A7 series and was named "Alpha". She has an unusual affinity with machines and people. Unlike most characters with cheerful personalities, Alpha is sweet without being saccharine. name: Nausicaä
description: The Princess of the Valley of Wind. She is clever, resourceful, and a skilled swordswoman. She is a windrider, who can read and utilize the wind well, and flies a "Mehve", a glider with an engine. She has an empathetic ability and can even communicate with insects from the Sea of Corruption. As a next chieftain of the Valley, she joins Kushana's army, but the gruesome reality of the war devastates her. name: Quetzalcoatl
description: **Faction**: Spectation Quetzalcoatl often referred to as Lucoa, is a former dragon goddess and an old friend of [Tohru](https://anilist.co/character/120970/Tohru). She was exiled from her seat after consuming cursed liquor that led her into a scandalous affair. As a member of the spectating faction, she does not interfere with any events involving the dragons or gods. She's by far the most powerful dragon in the series. name: Hitoka Yachi
description: __Team:__ Karasuno High __Position:__ Manager __Occupation:__ High School Student (1st Year, Class 5) A 1st year who was recruited by Shimizu as a manager trainee. She appears to be very nervous, but easily befriends Hinata. She's paranoid (which causes her to be intimidated easily), very curious, and is organized with her notes, including the ones that she takes from class; this is largely due to her mother being a graphic designer.

name: Honami Ichinose
description: __Height:__ 159 cm (5'2") If there was one sentence to describe Honami, it would be that she is genuinely kind-hearted, benevolent, and a pacifist to the core who is against using underhanded means and violence. One of her main traits is her unselfish and supportive personality, combined with her excellent social skills and her being naturally people-oriented. name: Ruri Gokou
description: __Height__: 155 cm Ruri Gokou—perhaps better known as her alter-ego Kuroneko (“Black Cat”)—is a member of the All Together, Otaku Girls online community that Saori manages. She goes to an offline meet-up where she meets both Saori and Kirino in person. Like Kirino, she remains aloof during this meeting, and it isn’t until after the meeting at Saori’s post-gathering that she is formally introduced. name: Satou
description: Satou is an Ajin. He is referred to by officials such as Yuu Tosaki as Hat (帽子, Boshi). His real name is Samuel T. Owen. While Satou's father is British and his mother is Chinese, he himself is from the United States of America. He was part of the United States Marine Corps in the past. Before dying for the first time he had a large x-shaped scar on the left side of his face and was missing his right leg. He is passionate about video games and gaming in general.

name: Seto Kaiba
description: __Height:__ 186 cm Seto Kaiba is the majority shareholder and President of his own multi-national company, KaibaCorp, who aims to become the world's greatest player of the Duel Monsters card game. To accomplish this goal, he must defeat his arch-rival, Yugi Muto. He is largely considered an anti-hero, as his motives are usually ego-centric, but in several cases towards a good cause.
